# awscc_bcmpricingcalculator_bill_scenario (Data Source)

Data Source schema for AWS::BcmPricingCalculator::BillScenario



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `arn` (String) The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the bill scenario.
- `bill_interval` (Attributes) The time period covered by the bill scenario (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--bill_interval))
- `bill_scenario_id` (String) The unique identifier of the bill scenario
- `cost_category_group_sharing_preference_arn` (String) The ARN of the cost category group sharing preference
- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the bill scenario was created
- `expires_at` (String) The timestamp when the bill scenario expires
- `failure_message` (String) The failure message if the bill scenario failed
- `group_sharing_preference` (String) The group sharing preference for the bill scenario
- `name` (String) The name of the bill scenario
- `status` (String) The status of the bill scenario
- `tags` (Attributes List) An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))

<a id="nestedatt--bill_interval"></a>
### Nested Schema for `bill_interval`

Read-Only:

- `end` (String)
- `start` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Read-Only:

- `key` (String)
- `value` (String)
